abilities.name: Blade Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, this model may move through enemy models. Deal 1 damage to enemy models moved through this way.

abilities.name: Combat Finesse
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (melee) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Storm of Steel
abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is hazardous terrain. Friendly models are unaffected by this terrain.

triggers.name: Into the Fray
triggers.text: After killing, all friendly sister models heal 2.

triggers.name: Whirlwind Attack
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (melee)2" of this model.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

actions.name: Changing Tactics
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. Move the target up to 3" and give it an Adaptable token.

triggers.name: Unorthodox Style
triggers.text: When resolving, this action affects all allies within range.

triggers.name: Fire at Will
triggers.text: The target may declare a (missile) action.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Sabotage Their Plans
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Target an enemy Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target, then remove the target.
